sections.paragraph:
verb לקדום

to precede, be previous, be first

verb לקדם

to greet, welcome, meet; promote

verb קודם (>>קֻדַּם)

be promoted; be greeted

verb להתקדם

to progress, advance

verb להקדים

to precede, be previous

verb הוקדם

to be brought forward (a meeting, visit, etc.)

verb לקדם (>>קידד)

to greet, welcome, meet; promote

masculine noun

front; east; ancient times, antiquity
